landing.title: ARMAF // ISLAND HEIST // DECODE THE MISSION
landing.subtitle: Your mission begins. Only some will reach the vault.

register.title: AGENT REGISTRATION
register.name: Full Name
register.consent: I consent to receive mission communications
register.ageGate: I confirm I am 18 years or older

briefing.title: CLASSIFIED BRIEFING
briefing.text: You are now an ARMAF operative. You have limited time to decode the mission. Each puzzle solved earns Intel Tokens. Tokens unlock advantages in the real-world heist.

cipher.title: CIPHER ROOM
cipher.instructions: Decode the encrypted message. Use the partial key to crack the cipher.
cipher.hint: Legacy detected. The original was just the beginning.

lock.title: LOCK ROOM
lock.instructions: Memorize the pattern. Reproduce it to unlock the vault.

coordinates.title: COORDINATES ROOM
coordinates.instructions: Match each visual hint to the correct location.
coordinates.reveal: Your coordinates are locked. The mission comes to {country}.

bonus.title: BONUS ROOM
bonus.instructions: Time is running out. Solve the final challenge for an extra token.
bonus.complete: Bonus cleared. Extra Intel Token earned.
